title: Reorganize workspace from src/ to crates/ and add beskid_abi
body:
## What was done

Reorganized the Rust workspace from monolithic **`src/`** into **`crates/`** and introduced **`beskid_abi`** for stable runtime/interop boundaries.

## Why it mattered

Matched how the later **compiler** submodule scales (many `beskid_*` crates) and separated ABI concerns from analysis/codegen crates.

## Outcome

Structure carried into v0.1 compiler foundation; prerequisite for CI workspace checks and AOT smoke tests.

source.subject: Add beskid_abi crate and reorganize workspace from src/ to crates/ directory structure
